channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/3/24)
channel.description: 嘿，今天的技术圈信息流里，关于 AI 编程和智能体（Agent）的内容特别多，尤其是围绕 **Claude Code** 的生态工具爆发式增长，感觉开发者们都在疯狂地给它“装插件”来扩展能力。同时，关于 AI 如何影响编程本身、以及本地运行大模型的讨论也很热烈。我帮你筛出了几件最有意思的事，一起来看看。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天的技术圈信息流里，关于 AI 编程和智能体（Agent）的内容特别多，尤其是围绕 **Claude Code** 的生态工具爆发式增长，感觉开发者们都在疯狂地给它“装插件”来扩展能力。同时，关于 AI 如何影响编程本身、以及本地运行大模型的讨论也很热烈。我帮你筛出了几件最有意思的事，一起来看看。

item.title: louislva/claude-peers-mcp
item.description: Allow all your Claude Codes to message each other ad-hoc! | 近期热门 | 总 965 stars
item.author: louislva

item.title: eze-is/web-access
item.description: 给 Claude Code 装上完整联网能力的 skill：三层通道调度 + 浏览器 CDP + 并行分治 | 近期热门 | 总 813 stars
item.author: eze-is

item.title: leo-lilinxiao/codex-autoresearch
item.description: Codex Autoresearch Skill — A self-directed iterative system for Codex that continuously cycles through: modify, verify, retain or discard, and repeat indefinitely. Inspired by Karpathy’s autoresearch concept. | 近期热门 | 总 797 stars
item.author: leo-lilinxiao

item.title: fastclaw-ai/weclaw
item.description: Connect to any agents with WeChat ClawBot. | 近期热门 | 总 493 stars
item.author: fastclaw-ai

item.title: SethGammon/Citadel
item.description: Agent orchestration harness for Claude Code. Four-tier routing (/do), campaign persistence across sessions, parallel agents in isolated worktrees, discovery relay between waves, lifecycle hooks, circuit breaker, and 6 production-quality skills. From solo developer to institutional scale. | 近期热门 | 总 230 stars
item.author: SethGammon

item.title: phlx0/drift
item.description: Terminal screensaver that activates when you're idle — constellations, rain, particles & braille waves. Press any key to resume. | 近期热门 | 总 190 stars
item.author: phlx0

item.title: openilink/openilink-hub
item.description: 开源微信 Bot 管理平台 | Self-hosted WeChat Bot Management & Message Relay | WebSocket + Webhook + AI Auto-reply | Passkey Login | 7 Language SDKs | 近期热门 | 总 166 stars
item.author: openilink

item.title: excutflyingjoe7412/Roblox-Brainrot-Asset-2026
item.description: Blox-Rot (2026) — Advanced Roblox Asset Stealer & UGC Limiteds Autobuyer. Extract Skibidi Toilet models, Dragon meshes, and rare animations from any game. High-speed sniper for Dragon and Brainrot themed limited items. Professional Roblox developer utility. | 近期热门 | 总 66 stars
item.author: excutflyingjoe7412
